title: Stand the Moonlit Watch
description: Travel to the Moonlit Trail and protect someone when danger closes in.

objective.text: Succeed at Defend on the Moonlit Trail.

title: Bring Back a Trail Token
description: Find something loose beneath the moonlit boughs and carry it away.

objective.text: Pick up an item on the Moonlit Trail.

title: Hold Your Ground
description: The trail teaches strength only to someone willing to brace against trouble.

objective.text: Succeed at Defend on the Moonlit Trail.

title: Hear the Rain Between Words
description: The garden rewards the person who listens closely enough to hear what it almost hides.

objective.text: Succeed at a Wisdom check in the Rain-Soft Garden.

title: Read the Cottage’s Clues
description: Look past the cottage’s comfort and work out what one of its details means.

title: Leave No Tracks
description: Learn the trail’s quietest route by escaping its danger unseen.

objective.text: Successfully flee danger on the Moonlit Trail.

title: Stand Before the Knight
description: Mara says a true guardian is known by what they protect in the flooded dark.

objective.text: Succeed at Defend in the Flooded Barrow.

title: Take the Hidden Lens
description: A guide learns to claim the one useful thing everyone else walked past.

objective.text: Pick up an item on the Mothwood Path.

title: Read the Soot
description: The failing lantern has a pattern in its soot for someone patient enough to reason it out.

title: Hear the Moths Turn
description: Pip knows the Mothwood gives warning, but only just before the danger arrives.

objective.text: Succeed at a Wisdom check on the Mothwood Path.

title: Lift the Stone Light
description: Saint Orra's broken lantern still has weight enough to teach honest leverage.

objective.text: Move the beacon work forward at Saint Orra's Ruin.

title: Slip the Barrow's Grasp
description: The flooded stones teach quiet feet to anyone who escapes without feeding the echo.

objective.text: Successfully flee danger in the Flooded Barrow.
